SEARCH
Package kp.company.mvc

Class DepartmentMVCTests

java.lang.Object
kp.company.TestsBase
kp.company.mvc.base.MVCTestsBase
kp.company.mvc.DepartmentMVCTests
@ExtendWith(org.springframework.test.context.junit.jupiter.SpringExtension.class) @WebMvcTest(kp.company.controller.DepartmentController.class) class DepartmentMVCTests extends MVCTestsBase
Application tests for department with server-side support.
The server is not started.
